commentaries.author: Ephrem The Syrian
commentaries.content: “Can the prey be taken from the giant?” These words refer to Christ, who took the imprisoned nations away from the demon, a mighty giant. Therefore the prey shall be snatched away from the mighty demon. - "Commentary on Isaiah 49.24"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Strong. Can I force the Babylonians to yield? Surely, and the devil also, Luke xi. 21.
Mighty. Hebrew, "just "in lawful war. Septuagint, "unjustly."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
